title: montia fontana var. minor
intro: Montia fontana var. minor, also known as the lesser mountain springbeauty, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Portulacaceae family. It is native to North America and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its high content of vitamins and minerals, such as vitamin C and potassium. Herbal preparations of Montia fontana var. minor can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and are often used to soothe sore throats, calm digestive issues, and promote wound healing.
